channel.title: PROJECT PRICE LIVE VIDEO
channel.description: Realtor and Homebuyer Property Estimate Strategy Videos

item.title: First-time buyer coaching: hidden repair cost risks in a starter home
item.dc:creator: projectprice
item.description: Before you buy: hidden repair cost risks can wreck your budget quickly. Use Project Price to compare repair costs, plan a offer reduction, and stop overpaying. #ProjectPrice #AIEstimate #RealEstateTools #ConstructionCost #FirstTimeHomeBuyer #HouseHunting #HomeRepair
item.content:encoded:
First-time buyer coaching: hidden repair cost risks in a starter home

Before you buy: hidden repair cost risks can wreck your budget quickly. Use Project Price to compare repair costs, plan a offer reduction, and stop overpaying. #ProjectPrice #AIEstimate #RealEstateTools #ConstructionCost #FirstTimeHomeBuyer #HouseHunting #HomeRepair

Watch on Project Price

item.title: Inspection surprise: roof leak risk in a older single-family home
item.dc:creator: projectprice
item.description: Quick reality check: roof leak risk can cost more than expected. Use Project Price to compare repair costs, plan a seller credit, and stop overpaying. #ProjectPrice #AIEstimate #RealEstateTools #ConstructionCost #HouseHunting #HomeRepair #StopOverpaying

item.title: Inspection surprise: foundation settling in a older brick home
item.dc:creator: projectprice
item.description: House-hunting tip: factor foundation settling in before making your offer. Use Project Price to compare repair costs, plan a seller credit, and stop overpaying. #ProjectPrice #AIEstimate #RealEstateTools #ConstructionCost #HouseHunting #HomeRepair #StopOverpaying

item.dc:creator: projectprice
item.description: House-hunting tip: factor kitchen cabinet and counter refresh in before making your offer. item.title: Deal saver: panel and wiring corrections in a recently flipped home
item.dc:creator: projectprice
item.description: Buyer warning: Deal saver: panel and wiring corrections in a recently flipped home can blow up a deal fast. Use Project Price to compare repair costs, negotiate smarter, and stop overpaying. #ProjectPrice #AIEstimate #RealEstateTools #ConstructionCost #HouseHunting #HomeRepair #LifeHacks
item.content:encoded:
Deal saver: panel and wiring corrections in a recently flipped home
